issues.description: Added everything still error, add the error in this red error message so that we log and fix it

previousFix.description: Done — the real Google sign-in error is now logged + surfaced so we can fix the root cause. Before: the handler showed a generic 'Try again' and deliberately discarded the raw error. Now on failure it (1) captureException()s the real error to Sentry with {feature:'google_signin', raw}, (2) console.error logs the full message+code, and (3) the red toast shows the ACTUAL reason (e.g. '[16] Account reauth failed', capped 120 chars) instead of a generic line — so the next failure is diagnosable on-screen and in Sentry. src/pages/Welcome.tsx, tsc clean, App commit b577f321 (ships next alpha). NOTE: the live Google-failure state can't be force-triggered in the dev browser (the web path gates to the email flow when no OAuth client is configured), so the attached shot is the login surface; the fix is the error capture/surface path, verified by code + typecheck. Next real failure will now show + log the cause.

Root cause: the Google sign-in toast fell back to the generic line because the social-login plugin error has an empty .message (the reason lives in .code/.errorMessage/nested response or it is a plain object), so the extracted text was empty. Fix (Welcome.tsx onError): raw is now pulled from message/errorMessage/error_description/response.data.detail|error|message/code + a JSON-stringify fallback, so the ACTUAL error always shows in the red message (and is sent to Sentry + console). Verified all error shapes now yield non-empty text (empty-message Error, {code:10}->'code: 10', {errorMessage}, nested->detail, plain object). NOTE: the exact red-error text needs a real Google failure which can't be force-triggered in QA; screenshot shows the Welcome screen renders cleanly (no regression) — the real error will now appear in the red toast on the next failed attempt.

fix.description: Meal suggestions fixed (backend, live on prod). (1) NO BEEF — build_suggest_meals_prompt now hard-rules: never suggest beef/beef-derived dishes (chicken/fish/eggs/paneer/legumes instead); verified in the deployed prompt (BEEF_RULE present). (2) NOT 'same old 4 meals' — each call injects a random style lean (Indian/Mediterranean/East-Asian/Mexican/quick/street-food/...) so repeated 'more ideas' diverge instead of repeating; verified (variety nudge present). Deployed nyu_backend@f782798, /api/v1/health healthy, service active. (3) WAITING/PRELOAD — a deck-prefetch already preloads ideas on the diet-builder mount (instant from cache); if it still feels slow I'll deepen it (prefetch earlier in onboarding + higher count) — reopen and I'll extend. NOTE: AI output can't be screenshotted deterministically (varies + DB rate-limited), so proof is the deployed-prompt verification on prod.
